sources.label: INFICON IR - Q1 2026 beat and raised FY26 guidance (Apr 24, 2026; pre-window, context only)
TipRanks - INFICON lifts 2026 outlook after strong Q1 (semis +23.5% YoY, AI demand cited)
Investing.com - INFICON quote/news page; analyst targets JPM CHF155, DB CHF160 vs price CHF160.2

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6; today's -1.2% is drift, not a setup change, so yesterday's hold stands. Small negative delta for rerating discipline: +54% YTD has the stock at/above recently raised sell-side targets (JPM CHF155, DB CHF160) with the April beat-and-raise fully in the price, so residual latent-node alpha keeps eroding.
verdicts.bull: Leak detection and process sensors are genuine per-fab consumable-like exposure to AI-driven semicap intensity; Semi & Vacuum Coating sales grew 23.5% YoY and FY26 guidance was raised to $710-750M with 18-20% OI margin.
verdicts.neutral: High-quality Swiss compounder whose AI/semicap linkage is now well understood and reflected in a ~CHF160 share price; the long-announced CFO handover (June 30) is a non-event with no new disclosures this window.
verdicts.bear: At +54% YTD and trading through raised analyst targets, the name is no longer hidden; any 2H semicap order digestion or a guidance walk-back would hit a stock priced for continued acceleration.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 2026 results / mid-year order intake confirming the AI-driven semiconductor acceleration behind the raised guidance.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-rerating crowding: valuation already discounts the upgraded outlook, leaving little asymmetry if semicap momentum cools.
